title: Krannich Solar adds Sigenergy to its product range
description: The distributor is expanding its portfolio with SigenStor, SigenStack, and EV charging solutions from Sigenergy. The partnership was announced at Intersolar Europe 2026 and aims to serve the growing market trend toward connected PV and storage systems. <pre>The distributor is expanding its portfolio with SigenStor, SigenStack, and EV charging solutions from Sigenergy. title: Compass Diversified Announces Amendments to Management Services Agreement Reducing Management Costs and Further Strengthening Shareholder Alignment
description: WESTPORT, Conn., July 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Compass Diversified (NYSE: CODI) (“CODI” or the “Company”), an owner of leading middle market businesses, today announced that it has entered into a Ninth Amended and Restated Management Services Agreement (the “Amended MSA”) with Compass Group Management LLC (the “Manager”), the Company’s external manager. The Amended MSA becomes effective upon execution, with the revised fee and incentive-award provisions taking effect on January 1, 2027.

title: Enerflex Ltd. Announces Director Resignation
description: CALGARY, Alberta, July 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Enerflex Ltd. (TSX: EFX) (NYSE: EFXT) (“Enerflex” or the “Company”) today announced that Fernando Assing will resign from the Board of Directors (the “Board”) effective July 17, 2026, to allow him to focus on other professional commitments, including his responsibilities as Chief Executive Officer of Camin Cargo Control.

title: Ukraine can soon build its own Patriots – but it could take years

description: Rheinmetall and MBDA aim to field an operational laser weapon for the German Navy in 2029.

title: Italy busts Russian spy ring collecting data on Ukrainian air defense vulnerabilities

description: On the heels of a Patriot license pledge, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky confirmed progress on billion-dollar defense tech deals with the U.S.

title: Trump flies old Air Force One out of Turkey, switches to new jet in Britain for trip home
description: President Donald Trump unexpectedly left Turkey on Wednesday aboard an older Air Force One rather than the newly renovated Qatari-donated jet.

description: Details were scant about a project that may amount to another European weapons-coordination umbrella rather than new technology development.

title: China shows snazzy clip of DF-17 missile on state TV in show of force
description: Experts say the broadcast answers Asia-Pacific military exercises by other countries, warning the U.S. that the weapons could cause pain in any war.

title: US Army tests autonomous mass minelaying
description: The Army’s Volcano mine dispenser can blanket 32 acres of terrain with up to 960 mines. Now, the Army is testing an autonomous version.

description: The U.S. Navy is searching for better methods of protecting its missile subs, as well as the shore installations that support them.

title: US will lift sanctions on Turkey, possibly sell F-35 fighter jets, Trump says
description: The sanctions were imposed in 2020 over the country's purchase of Russian defense missiles.

title: Germany set to become first international site for ATACMS missile production
description: The move addresses a bottleneck, as Lockheed Martin has been winding down ATACMS output at its Camden, Arkansas, site while prioritizing newer missiles.

title: Polish defense giant PGZ to produce Anduril’s Barracuda cruise missile
